title: Dirt Wake Word — backgrounds (AudioSet+FMA)
description: Re-host of openwakeword's background noise + music corpora, converted to 16 kHz mono PCM WAV. AudioSet from agkphysics/AudioSet bal_train/00.parquet (500 clips, FLAC); FMA-small from benjamin-paine/free-music-archive-small train-00000 (120 clips, MP3). Direct parquet read via pyarrow + soundfile (no HF datasets library). Upload once, reuse every training run. Mixed upstream licenses — personal/non-commercial use only, see openwakeword notebook for details.
